svg.text: PRE-EXECUTION COMPUTE EXCHANGE · A HERMES PLUGIN
Every query is priced, ranked, and cleared before a single token is spent.

g.text: value 0–100 · tier · cost · fee · net · vpt
cheapest model that clears the bar
single writer (dispatcher + cron) · readers (dashboard + gate) · BEGIN IMMEDIATE · busy_timeout 10s
events stream → dashboard WS tail · control.enforce ↔ live gate · source ∈ {demo, live} isolates analytics

svg.text: Bursar · pre-execution FinOps for the agent economy — waste prices itself out, the bill resets to what actually shipped.
